title: Raccoon Removal in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Gravesend, Brooklyn. Licensed experts serving residential & commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call for safe, humane raccoon control.
intro: Raccoons in Gravesend, Brooklyn can cause serious damage to homes and businesses, from raiding garbage bins along Avenue U to nesting in attics and chimneys. Our licensed raccoon removal specialists provide humane, effective solutions tailored to Gravesend's mix of single-family homes, multi-family residences, and commercial properties. We offer comprehensive removal, exclusion, and cleanup services to protect your property from these persistent wildlife intruders.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Gravesend residents for years with fast, reliable raccoon removal backed by full licensing and insurance. Our technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn wildlife control and use proven, humane methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent their return to your Gravesend property.
localContext: Gravesend's tree-lined streets near Marine Park and the dense residential blocks between Ocean Parkway and Coney Island Avenue provide ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially around older homes with accessible roof lines and chimneys. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces and the numerous garbage collection points along commercial corridors like Kings Highway make raccoon encounters increasingly common for local homeowners and businesses.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Gravesend, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Gravesend typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon extraction may cost $900–$1,500, while extensive infestations requiring multiple visits, exclusion work, attic cleanup, and structural repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Gravesend, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Gravesend due to the neighborhood's mature trees, accessible food sources, and mix of older homes with vulnerable entry points. Raccoons are particularly active near Marine Park, along tree-lined streets, and in areas with easy access to garbage. They often seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking winter den sites.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Gravesend home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching noises in your attic or walls at night, overturned garbage cans, torn roof shingles or soffits, visible paw prints, strong odors from urine or feces, and raccoon sightings on your roof or property. You may also notice damage to vents, chimneys, or insulation. If you observe any of these signs in your Gravesend home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Gravesend property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Gravesend raccoon emergencies. Simple removal cases can often be resolved in one visit, while complex infestations involving babies, extensive damage, or multiple entry points may require several visits over 1–2 weeks. After removal, we provide exclusion services to seal entry points and prevent future raccoon problems, ensuring your home remains protected long-term.
